title: Use of number
doc_html:
Art. 15. Use of number

            Unless the context indicates otherwise, words used in the singular include the plural, and the plural includes the singular.

            Acts 2025, No. 488, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 15.  Use of number
Unless the context indicates otherwise, words used in the singular include the plural,
and the plural includes the singular.
Acts 2025, No. 488, §1.
